# Get Quantum Ready with your GPUs – today

Why engineers trust BQPhy®
  * Peer-reviewed quantum-inspired algorithms
  * Compatible with CUDA, ROCm & hybrid stacks
  * Trusted by Fortune 500 engineering teams


The definitive guide to quantum-inspired engineering workflows. Get more from your existing GPU stack while building tomorrow’s quantum advantage.
  * Quantum-inspired algorithms for real GPU workloads
  * Step-by-step migration to hybrid quantum workflows
  * Performance benchmarks vs classical solvers
  * BQPhy QuantumNOW integration playbook

[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae999163734/686ccd10cd6eb3a15b64f13b_Placement.jpg) Optimization Solver Quantum-Inspired Optimization for Efficient Satellite Placement Enhanced accuracy for better satellite placements with Quantum Inspired Evolutionary Optimization method, delivering faster, reliable results Check Out ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67dba4e9226d4ae99916378b_arrow-right.svg) ](https://www.bqpsim.com/innovative-solution/see-how-quantum-inspired-evolutionary-optimization-enhances-satellite-placement)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae999163734/67dba4e9226d4ae999163847_Frame%2094%20\(3\).png) Multiphysics simulation Hybrid Quantum-Classical Methods for Structural Impact Analysis Enhanced accuracy for structural impact analysis with Hybrid Quantum-Classical Methods, delivering faster, reliable simulations Check Out ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67dba4e9226d4ae99916378b_arrow-right.svg) ](https://www.bqpsim.com/innovative-solution/see-how-hybrid-quantum-classical-finite-methods-enhance-accuracy-for-structural-impact-analysis)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae999163734/67dba4e9226d4ae999163813_Frame%2094%20\(2\).png) Data Driven solver Quantum-Assisted PINNs for Faster Training and Reduced Costs Revolutionizing PDE solutions: BQP’s Quantum-Assisted PINN reduces training time, cost, and complexity by 20% Check Out ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67dba4e9226d4ae99916378b_arrow-right.svg) ](https://www.bqpsim.com/innovative-solution/discover-how-bqps-quantum-assisted-pinn-algorithm-cuts-training-time-cost-and-complexity)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae999163734/686d11257f86ad483f093bde_image1.jpg) Optimization Solver Launch Vehicle Trajectory Optimization Using Quantum Algorithms Fuel-efficient, constraint-aware flight paths across ascent, hover, and descent Check Out ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67dba4e9226d4ae99916378b_arrow-right.svg) ](https://www.bqpsim.com/innovative-solution/launch-vehicle-trajectory-optimization-powered-by-quantum-inspired-evolutionary-optimization-qieo-algorithms)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae999163734/67dba4e9226d4ae9991638e3_result-1.png) Optimization Solver Airfoil Weight Reduction Optimization Without Structural Trade-Offs 6% lighter airfoils with unmatched strength, optimized 90% faster using BQPhy® advanced algorithms and expertise Check Out ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67dba4e9226d4ae99916378b_arrow-right.svg) ](https://www.bqpsim.com/innovative-solution/bqphy-achieved-6-more-weight-reductions-of-airfoils-without-compromising-strength)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae999163734/67dba4e9226d4ae999163827_Frame%2097%20\(1\).png) Optimization Solver Business Impact of Quantum Optimization in Trajectory Planning Revolutionizing Airline Efficiency: Optimized routes cut emissions by 18%, fuel by 4%, and flight time by 1% Check Out ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67dba4e9226d4ae99916378b_arrow-right.svg) ](https://www.bqpsim.com/innovative-solution/discover-the-bqphy-qieo-business-impact-on-trajectory-route-optimization)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae999163734/69afdc29c2c607abd5a1536c_AdobeStock_743599671.jpeg) Optimization Solver Optimized Airline Gate Allocation for Resilient Airport Operations BQPhy’s QIO solver delivers up to 3X faster convergence than Classical Algorithms for dynamic airport gate assignments, while consistently producing conflict-free schedules. Check Out ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67dba4e9226d4ae99916378b_arrow-right.svg) ](https://www.bqpsim.com/innovative-solution/optimized-gate-allocation-operational-resilience-for-airline-gate-scheduling-under-crew-and-duty-time-constraints)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae999163734/67dba4e9226d4ae999163848_Frame%2094%20\(4\).png) Optimization Solver QIEO Algorithm Benchmark: 3.9x Faster Than Genetic Algorithms Mission-critical optimization redefined: BQP’s QIEO delivers up to 3.9x faster results with unmatched accuracy and efficiency Check Out ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67dba4e9226d4ae99916378b_arrow-right.svg) ](https://www.bqpsim.com/innovative-solution/benchmarking-bqphys-qieo-algorithm-up-to-3-9x-faster-than-genetic-algorithms)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae999163734/67dba4e9226d4ae999163849_Frame%2094%20\(5\).png) Data Driven Solver Quantum-Inspired Crack Detection Achieving Near-Perfect Accuracy Quantum-enhanced crack detection achieves up to 100% accuracy, redefining reliability for critical infrastructure Check Out ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67dba4e9226d4ae99916378b_arrow-right.svg) ](https://www.bqpsim.com/innovative-solution/discover-how-quantum-enhanced-crack-detection-with-bqphy-achieves-near-perfect-accuracy)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae999163734/67dba4e9226d4ae99916384a_Frame%20129.png) Multiphysics simulation High-Fidelity Fluid Flow Simulation with Quantum Optimization Methods BQP’s hybrid quantum-classical methods achieve 10⁻⁵ accuracy and scale to complex, high-resolution simulations Check Out ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67dba4e9226d4ae99916378b_arrow-right.svg) ](https://www.bqpsim.com/innovative-solution/unlocking-unprecedented-accuracy-for-high-fidelity-complex-fluid-flow-simulations)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae999163734/69e60e3c232b31747a34cd68_Data%20Driven.jpeg) Optimization Solver Airfoil Shape Optimization Using Surrogate model & QIO Achieved high-accuracy drag prediction with R² = 0.996 and improved design convergence|| Faster exploration • Reduced evaluation cost • Stable optimization Check Out ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67dba4e9226d4ae99916378b_arrow-right.svg) ](https://www.bqpsim.com/innovative-solution/airfoil-shape-optimization-using-surrogate-model-qio)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae999163734/6930019516efc675b7b20519_AdobeStock_1799168923.jpeg%20\(1\).jpg) Physics-Based Solver Quantum CFD Achieves 100× Circuit Compression  BQPhy's QCFD algorithm, Classiq’s compiler and NVIDIA GPU simulators enabled 100× circuit-depth reduction and successful scaling to the 2D Poisson equation for quantum-accelerated PDE solving. Check Out ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67dba4e9226d4ae99916378b_arrow-right.svg) ](https://www.bqpsim.com/innovative-solution/qcfd-achieves-100x-circuit-compression)
[ ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae999163734/69300188f77a5ddd5f8adb77_AdobeStock_1616416169.jpeg%20\(1\).jpg) Data-Driven Solver QA-PINN Delivers 25× Faster CFD Training QA-PINN achieved a 20% parameter reduction and cut training time from 85 hours to 3.5 hours using NVIDIA’s CUDA-Q simulator—enabling faster, scalable CFD experimentation. Check Out ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/67dba4e9226d4ae99916370d/67dba4e9226d4ae99916378b_arrow-right.svg) ](https://www.bqpsim.com/innovative-solution/qa-pinn-delivers-25x-faster-cfd-training)
Frequently asked questions  

How can I collaborate with BQP?  

BQP welcomes partnerships with businesses, researchers, and innovators. To start, fill out the contact form on our website or email us at info@bosonqpsi.com. Our team will schedule a consultation to understand your goals and explore alignment with our quantum-powered solutions.
What industries or sectors does BQP work with?
We collaborate across industries such as engineering, finance, healthcare, logistics, and energy. Our quantum computing solutions are designed to solve complex optimization, simulation, and predictive challenges in diverse fields.  

Do I need to pay for a no-obligation pilot?
No. BQP offers a free, no-obligation pilot program to demonstrate the value of our solutions. This allows you to test our technology and assess its impact on your business before committing to a long-term partnership.  

What support does BQP provide post-implementation?
We offer dedicated technical support, regular updates, and training to ensure seamless adoption of our solutions.

Frequently asked questions
How can I collaborate with BQP?

BQP welcomes partnerships with businesses, researchers, and innovators. To start, fill out the contact form on our website or email us at info@bosonqpsi.com. Our team will schedule a consultation to understand your goals and explore alignment with our quantum-powered solutions.

What industries or sectors does BQP work with?

We collaborate across industries such as engineering, finance, healthcare, logistics, and energy. Our quantum computing solutions are designed to solve complex optimization, simulation, and predictive challenges in diverse fields.

Do I need to pay for a no-obligation pilot?

No. BQP offers a free, no-obligation pilot program to demonstrate the value of our solutions. This allows you to test our technology and assess its impact on your business before committing to a long-term partnership.

What support does BQP provide post-implementation?

We offer dedicated technical support, regular updates, and training to ensure seamless adoption of our solutions.
